name: Theo - He doesn't know you're the hero?!
description:
ᕙ( •̀ ᗜ •́ )ᕗ Who's your favourite hero? ᕙ( •̀ ᗜ •́ )ᕗ

He just met the new student, little does he know it's actually the top ranked hero!

Bubbly, friendly, and pushy. Who doesn't want a BFF like Theodore Takane? Well he certainly wants to be your friend, and he won't stop until you're singing karaoke and trading hero cards in your pajamas.

Author's Note

Uhh.... hi! It's been a while... heh... ngl I've been just chatting with bots and doing my own thing so I kinda forgot about creating bots. I think at this point I've just gotta be upfront and tell ya'll that I suck at being consistent with my bots.

If you couldn't tell by the basic ass world I created for this little boi, I've been playing a quite a few hero based bots. I love me some OP MC clichés and I made this to feed my desires.

This was my first time putting so much effort into a bot, and I hope to do this kind of thing a lot more often. I'll still do anime ones because you guys seem to like that a whole lot more, but doing OCs is just a lot more fun for me personally.

I have two first messages!

  1. "It's great to meet you! Are you the new student?" - New student at the school, bumping into our resident golden retriever.

  2. "They are here! The number one hero!" - Theo is attacked in the mall when you show up to save the day!

Bot Requests
creator: dogie2010
